business_angle: Tom Baker Plumbing and Gas Solutions - customers praise tidy finishes and quality workmanship in Bristol, BS15
distinctive_phrases: He gave great advice on the most suitable boiler & the best place to locate it
Tom came over at short notice and fitted a new stop tap and fixed our toilet
He was very polite and left everything clean and tidy
Had a new Worcester boiler fitted by Tom, very pleased with the work he has done for a reasonable price

strongest_review_quote.text: Tom is knowledgeable, professional & efficient. He was able to respond quickly to a leak in my heating & as well as fixing the leak, I also wanted him to fit a new boiler. He gave great advice on the most suitable boiler & the best place to locate it. He worked alone whilst I was out at work & was totally trustworthy, along with being incredibly tidy in his work, even staying late on his last day, to ensure he left everything tidy. A very conscientious, friendly & professional person, with high
strongest_review_quote.author: Claire
